rows.name: Mwangi Family Farm
rows.description: Large mixed farm with crops, livestock and horticulture

rows.name: Green Valley Horticultural Farm
rows.description: Specialised horticultural farm for export vegetables

rows.title: Fresh Wheat Grain
rows.description: Grade A winter wheat, clean and dry. Ready for milling.

rows.title: Dried Soybeans
rows.description: Non-GMO soybeans, 13% moisture. Ideal for animal feed.

rows.title: Fresh Tomatoes — Roma
rows.description: Firm Roma tomatoes, harvested today. Excellent for sauces.

rows.title: Fresh Whole Milk
rows.description: Farm-fresh whole milk, tested and certified. Daily supply.

rows.title: French Beans — Export
rows.description: Air-freight grade French beans, fine quality for export.

rows.title: Snow Peas
rows.description: Export-grade snow peas, pre-cooled and sorted.

rows.title: Corn (Yellow Maize)
rows.description: Dry yellow maize, aflatoxin tested. Ideal for milling.

rows.title: Boer Goat (Live)
rows.description: Healthy Boer goats 25-30kg. All vaccinated and dewormed.

rows.title: Sunflower Seeds
rows.description: Hybrid sunflower seeds, high oil content, clean grade.

rows.title: Heavy Rain Warning
rows.message: Heavy rainfall (45mm) expected in Nakuru from 14:00 today. Delay spraying operations and secure farm equipment.

rows.title: Irrigation Alert — Field A
rows.message: Soil moisture in Field A has dropped below 35% threshold. Wheat crop requires immediate irrigation.

rows.title: Early Blight Detected — Greenhouse 1
rows.message: Suspected early blight (Alternaria solani) detected on tomato plants. Isolate affected plants and apply copper fungicide.

rows.title: Wheat Price Alert +15%
rows.message: Nairobi grain market: Wheat prices have risen 15% to KES 25.30/kg. Consider selling current stock.

rows.title: May 2026 Payroll Generated
rows.message: Payroll for 8 workers has been computed for May 2026. Total payout: KES 448,000. Pending approval.

rows.title: UV Index Advisory
rows.message: UV Index forecast at 9 (Very High) between 11:00–15:00. Ensure livestock have shade. Limit outdoor worker exposure.

rows.title: Irrigation Complete — Field C
rows.message: Scheduled irrigation for Field C (soybeans) completed successfully. 3,500L water applied. Next scheduled: 48 hours.

rows.title: FMD Vaccination Reminder
rows.message: Foot-and-Mouth Disease vaccination due for cattle in Barn A within 7 days. Contact vet to schedule visit.

rows.title: New Buyer Inquiry — Tomatoes
rows.message: Organic Africa Exports has requested 500kg tomatoes at KES 85/kg. Check Marketplace for order details.

rows.title: Task Overdue: Irrigation Repair
rows.message: Samuel Kibet task "Repair irrigation pipe — Section E-3" is 2 hours overdue. Status still Pending.

rows.title: Daily Backup Complete
rows.message: Automatic daily backup completed at 02:00. All farm data secured (2.4MB). Last backup: 2026-05-09 02:00.

rows.title: Frost Advisory — Next 3 Nights
rows.message: Temperatures expected to drop to 8°C. Protect greenhouse crops and young transplants with frost covers.
